curriculumLoadSuperseded: Tree load was cancelled (a newer load started).
emptyTreeNoBranches: This tree has no branches yet.
freezeDownloadFailed: Could not save offline copy. Check your connection and try again.
freezeFirstNotice: Saves a copy on this device for use without internet. The tree will not check for updates until you turn this off. This is different from choosing a published version.
freezeOnHint: Copy saved on device; no automatic updates
freezeSavedOk: Offline copy saved on this device.
freezeTapHint: Save a copy for offline use on this device
releasesLocalSnapshotMissing: That version has no saved snapshot in this garden yet.
shareCodeLookupFailed: Share code "{code}" could not be resolved. Check relays and try again.
sourcesAddDuplicate: That tree is already in your list.{hint}
sourcesAliasPrivacyNote: Short names are looked up from a built-in list in the app (GDPR-friendly: no extra tracking).
sourcesDemoBranchDeleteBlocked: The Arborito demo is bundled tutorial content. Duplicate it as your own branch if you want a removable copy.
sourcesComposedTreeReadOnlyHint: Playlists are edited in Forest → Trees, not in construction mode.
sourcesCreateTreeNoBranches: Plant or import a branch first.
sourcesDeleteComposedTreeConfirm: Remove this tree from your trees?
sourcesDeleteTreeLinkConfirm: Uninstall this tree? It stays online, you can install it again any time.
sourcesDismissNeedTree: Add or load a tree before closing.
sourcesDuplicateBranchInTree: That branch is already in this tree.
sourcesDuplicateBranchLocal: You already have this branch on your device.
sourcesDuplicateTreeLocal: You already have a tree with the same branches.
sourcesExportBusyNetwork: Fetching lessons and building the file…
sourcesExportSheetHint: Choose language and which editions to include in “{name}”.
sourcesExportSheetHintLang: Choose which language to include in “{name}”.
sourcesExportSheetHintEditions: Choose which editions to include in “{name}”.
sourcesExportScopeCurrentDraft: Exports the live draft (lessons/ at the root of the file).
sourcesExportScopeAllHint: Adds each snapshot under versions/ in the same .arborito file.
sourcesExportTreeMissingBody: Some branches are not on this device and will be omitted from the file.
sourcesGlobalEditOwnDenied: Only this device with the publisher key can edit this tree.
sourcesGlobalEmptyLead: Paste a link below, use quick add, or open My Garden to plant a local tree.
sourcesGlobalHiddenHint: Community signals hide this listing from the public directory; only you (the owner) see it here. Anyone with a direct link may still open the tree in the app.
sourcesGlobalLegalDefenseFailed: Could not publish the owner response.
sourcesGlobalLegalDefenseNoReport: Could not load the latest legal timestamp. Try again shortly.
sourcesGlobalLegalDefenseNotOwner: Only the tree owner on this device can sign this response.
sourcesGlobalPartialBody: We only load a limited batch per query (the network is huge). Try more specific keywords, use a share code, or check again later.
sourcesGlobalReportTooSoon: You already reported this tree recently.
sourcesGlobalReportWeeklyLimit: Weekly limit reached (3 community reports). Legal notices are still available.
sourcesGlobalSearchHint: Search title, description, or public author name. Results are always partial. Refine your query or use a code.
sourcesGlobalTorrentIndexLagHint: Optional torrent mirror: the public list updates on a schedule, so very new trees may appear there after a short delay. Live network metadata is usually ahead.
sourcesGlobalVoteFailed: Could not publish your like. Try again.
sourcesGlobalVoteNeedNetwork: Turn on the network to like trees in Discover.
sourcesGlobalVoteTooSoon: Wait a moment before voting again.
sourcesOwnerDirectoryAppealNotOwner: Only the tree owner on this device can publish a directory appeal.
sourcesOwnerDirectoryAppealNoReports: No community reports to contest right now.
sourcesOwnerDirectoryAppealPlaceholder: Explain what you fixed or why the reports are unfounded (min. 80 characters). This signed statement resets community report scoring for reports up to now.
sourcesOwnerDirectoryAppealSuccess: Appeal published. Community report score was reset.
sourcesOwnerDirectoryAppealTooShort: Please write at least 80 characters so others can understand your response.
sourcesOwnerModerationBannerCommunity: Community reports: score {score} / threshold {threshold} (14 days). Respond or fix via ⋯ before the listing is hidden.
sourcesOwnerModerationBannerHidden: Community reports reached the threshold: hidden from Discover for others. You can contest via ⋯.
sourcesOwnerModerationBannerLegalHidden: Legal notice without owner response: hidden from Discover for others (you still see it here). Publish a signed response via ⋯.
sourcesOwnerModerationBannerLegalWindow: Legal notice: you have about 48 hours to publish a signed owner response (⋯ menu). Until then your listing is deprioritized in Discover but stays visible.
sourcesGuestSyncBannerTitle: Sync your progress so you don’t lose it
sourcesGuestSyncBannerBody: On the web, your lessons and streaks live only in this browser. Clearing cookies or site data can erase months of study. A free account backs them up encrypted and restores them on any device.
sourcesLocalModeBannerBody: Without the network there is no online catalog, share codes, forum, or sync. Turn it on anytime in Privacy & data.
sourcesLegalDisputeOwnerAfter48h: More than 48 hours have passed since the latest legal notice without your signed owner response. The entry is hidden from the in-app Discover index; submit your owner response below to record your position (direct links still work).
sourcesLegalDisputeOwnerBefore48h: Legal claim open: the listing is deprioritized in Discover but stays visible for about {hours} more hour(s) so you can submit a signed owner response under ⋯. If you do not respond within 48 hours, it is hidden from the in-app index (the tree is not deleted from the network).
sourcesLoadNotFound: Tree not found in your saved list.
sourcesLocalEmpty: Your garden is empty. Plant your first tree.
sourcesOneLinkHint: Type an 8-character share code (e.g. A3F7-K2M9) or paste the full link someone sent you. The app figures it out. Official short names are resolved on this device only.
sourcesPickBranchesBody: Select which branches to include in this tree.
sourcesRemixTreeHint: Local copy with the same branches. Discover groups identical branch sets into one listing.
sourcesRenderErrorBody: Something went wrong loading branches and trees. Try closing and opening Forest again.
sourcesShareLocalOnly: This tree is only on your device. Publish it first to get a share link.
sourcesSimilarTreesCollapsed: {{n}} more listings with the same branches (hidden)
sourcesTabBranchesSubtitle: Full branches, plant, import, install from the network and study.
sourcesTabForestSubtitle: Playlists that combine branches, create, remix, publish and share.
sourcesTabTreesSubtitle: Playlists that combine branches, create, remix, publish and share.
sourcesTreeEditorEmptySelected: Pick at least one branch below.
sourcesTreePublishedSharePrompt: Tree published on the network. Copy the share link now?
sourcesTreesEmpty: Create a tree by combining branches.
sourcesTreesTabHint: Trees are playlists: pick branches, remix, publish, and share a single link.
sourcesUnifiedAsk: What do you want to learn?
sourcesUnifiedListTruncBody: This combined view shows at most {{n}} rows after sorting. Refine the search or use Filters to show only one source type.
sourcesUnknownAlias: Unknown name “{name}”. Try an 8-character code or paste a full link.
treeLoadedFromCacheOffline: Showing cached copy, network refresh failed.
treesAccountRememberHint: Signed in: Arborito remembers network branches you use and reopens your last tree on other devices.
treesLocalOnlyGuestHint: Without an account, branches live only on this device. Sign in to carry branches and private drafts across phones and computers.
treesLocalOnlyHint: Trees that stay only on this device are not uploaded. Use the account sync toggle on a local tree, or publish when you want the world to see it.
webtorrentSeederNoMeta: This tree has no WebTorrent metadata to seed.
webtorrentSeederUnavailable: WebTorrent is not available in this environment.
sourcesDiscoverDisclaimer: Discover shows course names and descriptions from the servers you chose. Arborito does not review every course. If there is a problem, contact the author.
